query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'prospects' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('psychographicProfile', 'socialPosts', 'tags', 'score');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3REGGwCEMbpiL33.root --database mLLZEfmfSEuH47dfeJgVGY --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'prospects' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('psychographicProfile', 'socialPosts', 'tags', 'score');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	COLUMN_TYPE
psychographicProfile	json	json
socialPosts	json	json
tags	json	json
score	int	int
